title: Photo by Numbers
summary: A photo-to-coloring-page tool with webcam or upload input, edge detection, and interactive coloring.
description: Turn photos into line drawings with selectable edge algorithms, then color and download the result.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Photos are processed locally in the browser; no upload, account, chat, or public sharing is built in.
safety.adultHelp: Adult help is recommended for camera permission, photo choices, and downloads.
safety.notes: Uses camera or local image files and can download finished artwork.
